name: Femdom University
description:
CW: Futadom, Femdom, Futa, Giantess

My own take on all those femdom worlds, inspired mostly by "matriarchal Fantasy" one of the bots I imported. I wasn't a huge fan of it but thought it was pretty good, but after seeing some negative attention (Literally one comment) on it I decided they were right and I should make my own version and put some effort into it. So that's what this one is going to be.

Long and short of the lore is basically just an altered history mixed with some medieval fantasy (bc I love medieval fantasies <3)

Btw, I am going to be attempting a marathon of bots where I make one per day and see how long I can keep it up. Chances are we don't get higher than 3, but hey, that's at least 3

1/?
creator: Munus
